name: harness-cache
description: Codex plugin for using Harness Cache as a multi-agent source-pointer cache.

interface.shortDescription: Route agents to verified source ranges and measure token savings.
interface.longDescription: Harness Cache gives Codex a source-pointer cache workflow for repeated project investigations. It helps agents search cached pointers before broad reads, open targeted source ranges, record evidence, and compare estimated token use against a no-cache baseline.
defaultPrompt: Run the Harness Cache token-savings demo.
Inspect what is inside the Harness Cache.
Use source pointers before broad file reads.
